---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is hard, confusing, or impossible today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Evidence

Link or describe the real workflow, command, MCP client, editor, or repository
case where this would help.

## Constraints

Note any privacy, local-first, dependency, or compatibility constraints.
